w:r.w:t: is a digital platform that enables users to manage their finances, perform secure fund transfers, and monitor transactions conveniently from their browser. You will have to create an application which has several pages and core components.
This is the model layer of the application. There are some objects for you to implement first.
the first name of the user
the last name of the user
URL containing link to picture of the user
the amount available in the wallet
the date and time the new
their subscription when the time comes, if the subscription is
that could happen due to subscription change
in case the transaction can’t be executed for some reason
The application must support basic functionality involving
(Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations. You must implement repositories for every entity to persist data
When a new user registers, they need:
unique and store the user’s details securely. You must consider persisting user’s sensitive data in a secure way!
Automatically create a wallet for the user
Assign a free subscription to the user upon registration
method handles the entire flow. It takes a

w:r.w:t: Each user is assigned a wallet during registration. The wallet should be initialized with values defined in your configuration properties:
This ensures every user starts with a functional financial account
Skeleton for the Wallet Creation Logic:
Subscriptions provide access to app features. Every user starts with a
Renewals are allowed only for monthly subscriptions

w:r.w:t: Users can increase their wallet balance by performing a top-up operation.
Retrieve the wallet using its ID the user wants to top-up
wallets are not eligible for top-up
Add the top-up amount to the wallet balance
Record the transaction and save it for auditing purposes

w:r.w:t: A charge represents an outgoing payment from a wallet
Retrieve the wallet using its ID
Deduct the specified amount from the wallet balance
Record the transaction and save it
